S

saveGame(Game, int) - Static method in class utils.SaveManager
Saves the complete game state.
SaveManager - Class in utils
Manages saving and loading of games using serialization and text files.
setGame(Game) - Method in class controller.GameOverController
 
setPlayerName(String) - Method in class controller.GameController
Initializes a new game with the given player name.
setPosition(int, int, Orientation) - Method in interface model.IShip
 
setPosition(int, int, Orientation) - Method in class model.Ship
 
setSecondsPlayed(int) - Method in class controller.GameController
 
Ship - Class in model
Represents a single ship in the game.
Ship(int) - Constructor for class model.Ship
 
Ship(int, Orientation, int, int) - Constructor for class model.Ship
Creates a new ship.
ships - Variable in class model.Player
 
start(Stage) - Method in class Main
 
startNewGame() - Method in class model.Game
Starts or restarts the game.
SUNK - Enum constant in enum class model.AttackResult
